title: Need Suggestion
excerpt: We are a digital badge issuing platform, and we are planning to create a plugin for Monday.com to issue digital badges via IssueBadge.com. Our goal is to provide micro-credential certificates to employees for their achie…

posts.author: issuebadge (issuebage)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a digital badge issuing platform, and we are planning to create a plugin for Monday.com to issue digital badges via IssueBadge.com. Our goal is to provide micro-credential certificates to employees for their achievements, such as good performance, attending workshops, participating in cyber security seminars, etc.

What do you think— is there a need for this kind of plugin? Would you pay for it?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Personally I wouldn’t pay for it but perhaps other industries would.

posts.author: issuebadge (issuebage)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your reply. Normally how do you sent verifiable certificate? or genate bulk certificate? do you use any other tools?
